calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:48am

Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Miguel Antonio Tolentino appears in pro per with Blanca Santana to interpret Spanish to English and English to Spanish. Respondent, Roberto Villanueva Cervantes present in pro per with Ana Villanueva to interpret Spanish to English and English to Spanish. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant. Juel Villanueva testifies as a witness on behalf of the Respondent. Ana Villanueva interprets Spanish to English and English to Spanish.

10:21AM
No exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-11-2011 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-08-2011 Reset From Apr-20-11 To May-11-11 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
